source: Liu Y-T, Mayer-Kress G, Newell KM (2006). Qualitative and quantitative change in the dynamics of motor learning. J Exp Psychol Hum Percept Perform. 32(2):380-393.
description: Piecewise function parameters for three-phase motor learning curve with variability envelope. Normalized time t in [0, 1]; normalized performance in [0, 1].

variability_envelope.note: Primary CV peak at t=0.27 corresponds to the bifurcation zone; maps to chi_max at p_c in the percolation model.

network_correspondence.plateau_to_subcritical: Performance floor; p < p_c; fragmented coordination network
network_correspondence.bifurcation_to_critical: Rapid sigmoid rise; p ~ p_c; giant component emerges; CV peak = chi_max
network_correspondence.stabilization_to_supercritical: Asymptotic refinement; p > p_c; consolidated network with preferential hub weighting
